name: angry
description: Angry review council — blunt single-axis review personas + a council orchestrator

interface.shortDescription: Blunt multi-axis review personas + council orchestrator
interface.longDescription: A panel of blunt, single-axis review personas (code, correctness, security, prose, design, product, …) plus a council orchestrator that convenes the relevant ones and synthesizes one ranked verdict. Each persona reviews through one lens only.
